productDisplayName: Warner Bros Kids Unisex Turquoise Blue Flip Flops
description: Style Note Happy little feet in colour pop brights - this pair of flip flops from warner bros knows how to capture your little one's heart. The flip flops have cartoon characters that are printed on a bright upper - grab a pair with your little one's favourite cartoon on it! Product Details Sea blue flip flops with thong straps and a an elasticated back strap with mock buckle closure Footbed with Tweety cartoon print on it Soft rubber outsole with patterns on it Material and Care Rubber Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight
